description: Self-curating agent memory kept honest by survival-based selection over measured outcomes.

cmd.description: Install the mcp extra alongside the version-pinned package; with --from, uvx would read the darwin-memo@VERSION spec as a literal executable name and fail
cmd.name: --with

name: io.github.rogermsc/darwin-memo

environmentVariables.description: Path to the persistent memory file (default ~/.darwin-memo/memory.json)
environmentVariables.name: DARWIN_MEMO_PATH

packageArguments.description: Subcommand of the darwin-memo console script (the one uvx runs for darwin-memo@VERSION) that serves MCP over stdio

runtimeArguments.description: Install the mcp extra alongside the version-pinned package; with --from, uvx would read the darwin-memo@VERSION spec as a literal executable name and fail
runtimeArguments.name: --with

title: darwin-memo
